title: My Top Dividend Growth Pick In Each GICS Sector
text: I present my top dividend growth stock in each of the 11 GICS Sectors. The 11 stocks are discounted and have safe dividends.

title: Ameresco and Bright Canyon Energy Partner to Build Large Scale Solar and Battery Project Promoting Clean Energy and Resiliency in Hawai‘i
text: FRAMINGHAM, Mass. & PHOENIX & HONOLULU--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #batteryenergystorage--Ameresco and Bright Canyon Energy partner to build large scale solar and battery project promoting clean energy and resiliency in Hawai‘i.
